name: Create Work Item

metadata.description: Tests the agent's ability to create a new work item with specified properties

domainHints: This is a sprint planning board for an agile software development team. Work items have statuses: todo, in-progress, in-review, done. Priorities are: critical, high, medium, low. Story points use Fibonacci numbers: 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13.

datasets.name: Create a work item
datasets.prompt: Create a new task titled 'Fix login bug' with high priority

rubrics.name: Task Completion
rubrics.description: Did the agent create a new work item? The output should contain one more work item than the input (7 total instead of 6).

rubrics.name: Correct Properties
rubrics.description: Does the new work item have the correct title containing 'Fix login bug', priority set to 'high', and a reasonable default status (e.g., 'todo')?

rubrics.name: Data Integrity
rubrics.description: Were all 6 existing work items preserved without modification to their titles, statuses, priorities, assignees, or other properties?

dataInterpretationPrompt: The input is the initial state of an agile sprint board as a tree structure containing work items and team members. The output is the final state after an AI agent processed a user prompt. Compare the input and output trees to evaluate whether the agent correctly fulfilled the user's request while preserving existing data.
